matches.x: 1 UPON you my fellow servants, in the name of Messiah I confer the Priesthood of Aaron, which holds the keys of the ministering of angels, and of the gospel of repentance, and of baptism by immersion for the remission of sins; and this shall never be taken again from the earth, until the sons of Levi do offer again an offering unto the Lord in righteousness.

Upon you my fellow servants, in the name of Messiah I confer the
 Priesthood of Aaron, which holds the keys of the ministering
 of angels, and of the Gospel of repentance, and of baptism by
 immersion for the remission of sins; and this shall never be taken
 again from the earth, until the sons of Levi do offer again an
 offering unto the Lord in righteousness. [1]

69 Upon you my fellow servants, in the name of Messiah, I confer the Priesthood of Aaron, which holds the keys of the ministering of angels, and of the gospel of repentance, and of baptism by immersion for the remission of sins; and this shall never be taken again from the earth until the sons of Levi do offer again an offering unto the Lord in righteousness.

The Priesthood of Aaron By President Gordon B. Hinckley Counselor in the First Presidency “Upon you my fellow servants, in the name of Messiah I confer the Priesthood of Aaron, which holds the keys of the ministering of angels, and of the gospel of repentance, and of baptism by immersion for the remission of sins; and this shall never be taken again from the earth, until the sons of Levi do offer…

The Aaronic Priesthood and the Sacrament By Elder Dallin H. Oaks Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles Those who hold the Aaronic Priesthood open the door for all Church members who worthily partake of the sacrament to enjoy the companionship of the Spirit of the Lord and the ministering of angels. My beloved brethren, I appreciate the opportunity to speak to you this evening. I address my remarks…

1 UPON you my fellow servants, in the name of Messiah I confer the Priesthood of Aaron, which holds the keys of the ministering of angels, and of the gospel of repentance, and of baptism by immersion for the remission of sins; and this shall never be taken again from the earth, until the sons of Levi do offer again an offering unto the Lord in righteousness.

 Priesthood of Aaron, which holds the keys of the ministering
 of angels, and of the Gospel of repentance, and of baptism by
 immersion for the remission of sins; and this shall never be taken
 again from the earth, until the sons of Levi do offer again an
 offering unto the Lord in righteousness. [1]
